payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled in this environment because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. I did not execute the query and did not create or modify any memory cards.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an admin SQL/debug request, not a durable user memory statement. SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Received admin SQL request: SELECT * FROM memory_cards.
Did not commit any durable memory.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL request.
Use a supported non-SQL memory inspection/debug endpoint if available.
Ask for an explanation of expected memory behavior without attempting SQL execution.
